moments.title: World Cup Knockout Stage Begins
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 progresses to the Round of 32 today, with the Round of 16 kicking off tomorrow, featuring top teams battling for a place in the quarter-finals.

angles.name: Today's Games
angles.copy: It's do-or-die time! The FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 is on today, with Argentina's Lionel Messi hoping to extend his Golden Boot lead against Cabo Verde. Who are you backing?

angles.name: Round of 16 Preview
angles.copy: The knockout stage heat is on! The FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 16 starts tomorrow, setting up some massive clashes. Who do you think will make it to the Quarter-Finals?

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships Underway
moments.blurb: The prestigious Wimbledon Championships continue at the All England Club, with top tennis stars competing for Grand Slam glory until July 12th.

angles.name: Centre Court Action
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are flying! Wimbledon is in full swing, bringing world-class tennis to London. Who's your pick for the men's and women's singles titles this year?

angles.name: London Buzz
angles.copy: The capital is buzzing with Wimbledon fever! Even if you're not courtside, you can feel the energy across London. What a fortnight for sport!

moments.title: Wireless Festival 2026 Cancellation
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival 2026, scheduled for July 10-12 in Finsbury Park, was cancelled in April after headliner Ye's Electronic Travel Authorisation was withdrawn by the UK Home Office.

angles.name: Festival Fallout
angles.copy: Still reeling from the Wireless Festival 2026 cancellation? The planned July 10-12 event was scrapped after Ye's UK entry was denied. A huge blow for fans and the festival scene.

angles.name: London's Lost Gig
angles.copy: Finsbury Park won't be hosting Wireless Festival this year after the surprise cancellation. What are your thoughts on the impact on London's summer music calendar?

moments.title: Official Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holds strong at number one in the Official Singles Chart Update for the week ending July 1st, compiled by the Official Charts Company.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: Your Official Singles Chart update is in! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are still reigning supreme with 'Rein Me In'. Is it your number one this week too?

angles.name: Friday Feels
angles.copy: It's New Music Friday! While the charts are locked, we're spinning the latest from Madonna, Kylie Minogue, Becky Hill, and more. What's hitting your speakers today?

moments.title: Silo Season 3 Premieres
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated third season of the dystopian drama 'Silo' begins today, July 3rd, on Apple TV, with new episodes releasing weekly.

angles.name: New Sci-Fi Drop
angles.copy: Dive back underground! Season 3 of the gripping dystopian series 'Silo' drops today on Apple TV. Are you ready for more mysteries and rebellion?

angles.name: Weekend Binge Starter
angles.copy: Your weekend binge just got an upgrade! 'Silo' Season 3 kicks off today. Perfect for some intense sci-fi viewing.

moments.title: Ann Droid Launches on BBC
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars in the new BBC comedy 'Ann Droid', about a social humanoid robot assisting an elderly person, set to premiere on July 17th.

angles.name: Diane Morgan's New Role
angles.copy: Diane Morgan as a robot? Yes please! Her new BBC comedy 'Ann Droid' lands July 17th. Get ready for some dry wit and futuristic laughs.

angles.name: Future of Care
angles.copy: A robot companion for the elderly – the premise of new BBC comedy 'Ann Droid' starring Diane Morgan. A timely and funny look at our future, arriving July 17th.

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Schools across the UK are starting to break up for the summer holidays, with Northern Ireland already out and many English and Welsh schools finishing later in July.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: The summer holidays are officially underway for many across the UK! Whether you're staying local or heading off, enjoy the break! What are your plans?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: It's the start of summer holiday adventures! From staycations to day trips, families across the UK are gearing up for fun. Where are you off to?

moments.title: Michelle Branch's Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Michelle Branch, known for hits like 'Everywhere' and 'The Game of Love', celebrates her 43rd birthday today, July 2nd.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Michelle
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 43rd Birthday to Michelle Branch! Still loving 'Everywhere' and 'The Game of Love'. What's your favourite Michelle Branch track?

moments.title: Huey Lewis's Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, turns 76 on July 5th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Huey
angles.copy: It's the Power of Love! Wishing a fantastic 76th birthday to Huey Lewis on July 5th. What's your go-to Huey Lewis and the News hit?

moments.title: RZA's Birthday
moments.blurb: American rapper and producer RZA, a founding member of Wu-Tang Clan, celebrates his 57th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: Wu-Tang Birthday
angles.copy: Shaolin style! Happy 57th Birthday to the legendary RZA of Wu-Tang Clan on July 5th. What's your favourite track from the Abbot?

moments.title: 50 Cent's Birthday
moments.blurb: American rapper, actor, and businessman 50 Cent turns 51 on July 6th.

angles.name: Go Shorty, It's Your Birthday
angles.copy: It's 50 Cent's 51st birthday on July 6th! From 'In Da Club' to 'Candy Shop', what's your favourite hit from the rap icon?

moments.title: Ringo Starr's Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Peace and Love for Ringo
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr on July 7th! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

moments.title: Jack White's Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning musician, singer, songwriter, and producer Jack White, known for The White Stripes, turns 51 on July 7th.

angles.name: Rock Star Birthday
angles.copy: Seven Nation Army couldn't hold back the birthday wishes! Happy 51st to the incredible Jack White on July 7th. What's your favourite White Stripes or solo hit?

moments.title: Mavis Staples' Birthday
moments.blurb: American gospel and R&B singer Mavis Staples, a member of The Staple Singers, celebrates her 87th birthday on July 10th.

angles.name: Soulful Birthday
angles.copy: A true legend turns 87 on July 10th! Happy Birthday to the iconic Mavis Staples, whose voice continues to inspire. What's your favourite Staple Singers classic?

moments.title: Neil Tennant's Birthday
moments.blurb: Neil Tennant, lead vocalist and keyboardist of the iconic synth-pop duo Pet Shop Boys, turns 72 on July 10th.

angles.name: West End Birthday
angles.copy: Go West! Wishing a very Happy 72nd Birthday to Neil Tennant of Pet Shop Boys on July 10th. What's your ultimate PSB anthem?

moments.title: Perrie Edwards' Birthday
moments.blurb: English pop singer Perrie Edwards, best known as a member of Little Mix, celebrates her 33rd birthday on July 10th.

angles.name: Little Mix Birthday
angles.copy: Shout Out to My Ex... and a huge Happy 33rd Birthday to Perrie Edwards on July 10th! What's your favourite Little Mix track?
